---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new convention, workflow, or repository capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## desired
<!-- What should be added or changed? -->

## current
<!-- What exists today or what is missing? -->

## hint
<!-- Optional implementation ideas, references, or constraints -->

## scope
<!-- Which files, workflows, or conventions are in scope? -->

## acceptance
<!-- What must be true for this feature to be complete? -->
